headline: Chuckles McSnicker Wins Stand-Up Competition By Telling No Jokes, Just Staring At Audience
summary: The silent set lasted 10 minutes and was called 'brave' and 'uncomfortably confrontational.'
fullBody: Chuckles McSnicker won a stand-up comedy competition by standing silently on stage for 10 minutes, staring at the audience. 'I let the silence speak for itself,' McSnicker said. The judges called it 'avant-garde' and 'existential.' The audience was confused but too uncomfortable to leave. McSnicker's next set will be him sitting in a chair for an hour. Tickets are already sold out.
